summary: Read-only plan keeps #88812 as the live canonical for cross-channel reply latency decomposition. #94459 is the open implementation candidate but is excluded as existing-overlap context and is not merge-ready because it has failing checks and unresolved review concerns. #84725 remains related but distinct Codex warm-turn setup latency work. Closed linked refs are kept closed as historical evidence only.

actions.reason: #88812 is still the best live canonical for this cluster; no close, label, merge, or fix mutation is allowed or needed in plan mode.

#94459 is related as the current candidate fix for #88812, but merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout is blocked by excluded-overlap scope, failing checks, unresolved review concerns, and blocked merge/fix actions.
#84725 belongs to the same latency family but has a distinct Codex warm-turn harness setup scope, so it should not be closed or folded into #88812.
Already-closed context ref; no closure action is valid.
Already-closed adjacent trace-correlation issue; no closure action is valid.
Merged historical PR is related context and partial prerequisite work, not an open action target for this plan.
